ref_classifications.reason: 正文為 'Redrawn from [SGA18, Figure 20.5]'——[SGA18] 是參考文獻 citation key，Figure 20.5 屬被引外部出版品，非本書 figure（本書僅 ch01–ch15，無第 20 章）。
ref_classifications.evidence: ch02 body[22] caption: '...the dotted line is the response of the open loop system. Redrawn from [SGA18, Figure 20.5].'
